zh.lifeSummary: 當William Dyve於大約1130年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾易亞斯特 哈登時，他的父親Hugh de Dyve57歲，母親Helewise Unknown7歲。他與Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1190年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾維其肯享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dyve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Rajesh, Bharat, Ashok, Kamlesh, Kiran, Amit, Dilip, Kirit, Mukesh, Prakash, Raj, Ramesh.
Indian (Gujarat; pronounced as two syllables): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit dvivedī ‘(one who has studied) two Vedas’. Compare Dube 5.
English: from the personal name Dave, a short form of David .

variants.name: Dube
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Armand, Pierre, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Andre, Laurent, Gilles, Herve, Jacques.

French (Dubé): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone from Le Bé, the name of several places in northwestern France. Compare Duba 3, Dubay 1, Dubey 1, Dubie 2, and Duby 2.
Breton (Dubé, also Le Dubé): nickname from dube, a term denoting a kind of pigeon.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Dyve was born about 1130, in East Haddon, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Hugh de Dyve, was 57 and his mother, Helewise Unknown, was 7. He married Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1190, in Wicken, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Dyve est né environ 1130, à East Haddon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Dyve, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Helewise Unknown, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1190, à Wicken, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Dyve um 1130 in East Haddon, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Dyve 57 und seine Mutter Helewise Unknown 7. Er hat Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1190 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Wicken, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Dyve è nato il circa 1130 nel East Haddon, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Dyve, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Helewise Unknown, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1190, nel Wicken, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Dyveが約1130年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエアスト ハッドオンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Dyveは57歳，母Helewise Unknownは7歳であった。Mathilda "Maud" de Watervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1190年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィクンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Dyve(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 노르섬프토실르 이스트 하던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Dyve(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Helewise Unknown(은)는 7세였다. 그는 Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 윅컨에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Dyve nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em East Haddon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Dyve, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Helewise Unknown, tinha 7 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1190, em Wicken, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Dyve родился около 1130 г. в местности эаст хаддон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Dyve было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Helewise Unknown, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1190 г. в местности виккен, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1190, en Wicken, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
